GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Sayın Bakanım, şunu söyleyebilir miyim Ednan Bey'in sorusuna?
Şimdi, bilgi, belgenin gelmesiyle alakalı, maalesef memleketimizde gecekondulaşma var, her konuda var. Şimdi, bakın, 1975 yılında onkoloji hastanesi olarak yapılmış olan Kartal Devlet Hastanesi yandığı zaman başka bir yapıya bürünmüş. Benim okuduğum İTÜ Kimya Metalurji Fakültesi 1983 yılında Kimya Metalurji oldu, bir binamız vardı. 1985'te cam ve seramik binası yapıldı. Ben İngiltere'ye gittim, geldim, 2 bina daha yapılmış. Yani bu binayı baştan tasarlayıp şöyle dört başı mamur yapamıyoruz. Sorun ne oluyor biliyor musunuz? Mimar arkadaşımız burada, mimar da varsa içinizde, her binanın ıslak hacimleri, yaş hacimleri bellidir; işte tuvaletler, kadın-erkek vesaire. Bizim o kadar büyük bir tuvalet zenginliğimiz oldu ki 4 tane ayrı bina olduğu için her binanın her ucunda tuvalet var ve biz bunları sonradan odaya çevirme durumunda kaldık. Sıkıntımız bu Sayın Vekilim. Yani mesela havaalanı yangınında diyoruz ki "Kardeşim, burası dış hatlardı, kargo olmuş." Şimdi, şu kadar yerde samimi söylüyorum, 10 tane ofis yapmışlar, her birinde klima var. Biz diyoruz ki bunun tesisatını yollayın, bir şeyler verin, 14 çuval harita, pafta bilmem ne, hepsi 1975'ten 1977'ten kalma. Yani zaten o yüzden şu çözüm önerileri çok önemli. Yani biz bir şey istiyoruz, görmedim, duymadım, yapmadım, bilmedim. En önemlisi ne biliyor musunuz? Elektriği, gazı, suyu şey yapın da, LPG tesisatı çok önemli. Yani LPG tesisatında firma ismi fark etmez, biz yıllardır bunlarla çalışıyoruz. İşte, yurt yangınını hatırlayın, Aladağ, Konya vesaire.
Sayın Vekilim, her firmanın ne kadar düzgün iş yaparsa yapsın sorumluluğu var, müteselsil sorumluluğu var. Dolayısıyla, yani "Ben işimi düzgün yaptım."la bitmiyor bu iş. Şimdi, biz merak ediyoruz, sen oraya koymuşsun tankı, sen oraya, içeriye tesisatı koymuşsun, sen "şov kısmı" dediğimiz insanların yoğun olduğu, -herkes orada kayak yapmıyor, fotoğraflara ve videolara baktığınız zaman insanlar orada yemek yiyor, vakit geçiriyor vesaire en az 70-80 kişi var, zaten 100'den fazla çalışan var- bir alanda nasıl önleyici ve koruyucu tedbirleri almadan LPG'yi bu kadar rahat getiriyorsun?
Bu arada bir detayı atladık. Şimdi, bakın, şurada görüyorsunuz herhâlde.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Uzun kalmış.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Şu LPG geliyor ya, şuradan bağlı, uzatmış bunu, buradan "flexi" boruyla geçirmiş. Şimdi, burada bir şekilde yanıyor, alttan yanıyor. Bu arada bu dolabın altında birtakım şeyler var, bunlar yanıyor, çöp yanıyor. Eğer burada davlumbazda, şurada bir otomatik söndürme sistemi olsa iş bitecek. Burada geliyor, burayı önce ısıtıyor. Bu esasında doğru bir şey. Isıttıktan sonra LPG sızmaya başlıyor, biz bunları an an görüyoruz. Bu sızdıktan sonra yani şu hortum şurada olmasa, şuradan bağlasa, burası yanarken -birkaç dakika sonra kızlar gelip gidiyor zaten servis yapanlar- bunu görüp belki söndürecek. Buradaki yanlış, teknik. Şimdi, bunu kim çekti diyoruz? Bunun cevabı yok. Bunu buraya kim getirdi?
RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - Videodan izlediniz mi onu?
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - İzledik tabii.
Yani sıkıntı şu: Burada algılayıcı olsa, tam otomatik bir söndürme sistemi olsa sorun yok.
Bu hortumlar düzgün çekilse oradaki personel de müdahale edebilir.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Fiziksel olarak gelme şansı varsa... Dijital isterim.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - İsteyelim Başkanım, onu daha önce de söylemiştik.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - Orta girişin oradaki yüksek kameradan var sadece.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Bu arada, özür dilerim Bakanım, ben size ekleri verebilirim, benim bilgisayarımda var, USB'yle verebilirim.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Problem yok, alırız yani şeydir ama dijital olarak gelebilme şansı var mı, bilmiyorum, bir bakayım.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Gelemez, zor, mutlaka USB'yle falan ya da WeTransfer'le yani Drive'la gelmesi lazım.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Onu bizim uzmanımız Emrah Bey takip etsin, ona göre şey yapalım.
Ednan Bey, tamamladın...
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Başkanım, tamamlamadım bitmedi, devam ediyorum.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Ama rica ediyorum...
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Şimdi, itfaiye raporu...
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Toplantıyı sizinle bitiremeyiz.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Başkanım, zaman... Ya, bakın, şöyle söyleyeyim: Bundan önce gelen arkadaşlarımızın hepsi de çok değerli, kıymetliydi, hepsini de vaktimiz olduğu kadar dinledik ama burada bu işin ana gövdesini oluşacak olan, bilirkişi raporunu hazırlayan arkadaşlar buradayken...
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Anladım ama Ednan Bey, sizden başka arkadaşlarımız da var yani.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Tamam efendim, on ikiye kadar sürsün, sabaha kadar sürsün ama biz bu işi de bir konuşalım.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Anladım da bu Komisyon sizden ibaret değil ki diğer arkadaşlarımız da söz istiyor, onlara da vereceğim.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Başkanım, verirsiniz. Burada lütfen, rica ediyorum, ben işimi bitireyim, ben sorularımı sorayım Başkanım.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Rica ediyorum.
O zaman yorum yapmadan soru sorun bitirelim.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Yorum yapma değil, ben kısa kısa soru soruyorum.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Ama bakın, yarım saat oldu size ayırdığımız zaman, yarım saattir siz konuşuyorsunuz ama rica ediyorum.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Sayın Başkanım ben yarım saattir konuşmuyorum.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Ama önümde, görüyorum arkadaşlar, bir sürü arkadaşımız da istiyor söz.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Ya, kimse söz istemiyor demiyorum ki ben yani sizin bu işi acelece bitirme hevesinizi de ben çözemedim yani.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Acele etmiyorum arkadaşlar ama 15 arkadaşım daha var.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Bırakın da ben konuşayım ya. Tamam Başkanım, benden bu kadar...
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - O zaman buyurun, siz yapın toplantıyı.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Sayın Bakanım, özür dilerim, Ednan Bey'in sorduğu sorular esasen birçok üyemizin soracağı sorular, o yüzden bence...
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Anladım, şey değil... Hocam, rica ediyorum, biz burada, bu arkadaşlar da boşuna oturmuyor.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Ağabey, ben bir iki tane daha sorayım, siz şey yapın, bir saniye.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Buyurun.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Şimdi, bu, 2007 yılındaki itfaiye raporu. 2002'de bir yangın yönetmeliği çıktı, bu yangın yönetmeliğinde diyor ki: "Mevcut yapılar, var olan binalar iki yıl içerisinde eğer bu eksikliklerini gidermezlerse kapatılır." Yani yapı kullanma izin belgeleri iptal olur. Size hiç böyle bir belge ulaştı mı? Yapı kullanma izin belgesi iptal olmuştur tarzında 2004 yılı için, 2005 yılı için böyle bir belge ulaştı mı size?
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - Yok öyle bir belge...
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Öyle bir belge ulaşmamış. Sonuçta 2002'de bir yönetmelik var, çıkmış, mevcut bu oteller için iki yıl tanımlamış ama dört yılda ya da 2004 ya da 2005 yılında bu otelin yapı kullanma izin belgesi iptal edilmesi gerekirken iptal edilmemiş. Bir de ilginç bir şekilde itfaiye raporunun tarihi 22/11/2007, ondan sonraki yönetmeliğin yürürlüğe giriş tarihi de 19/12/2007 yani neredeyse yirmi, yirmi beş gün öncesinden bir itfaiye rapor alınmış. Yani bu itfaya raporunu kimin, kimlerin verdiği, nasıl tespitler yaptığı, ne tür incelemeler yaptığı bence izaha muhtaç.
Bir de bu raporunuzda önemli şeylerden biri şu, 38'inci sayfada şunu diyorsunuz: Elimizdeki mevcut belge kayıtları incelendiğinde geçmiş yıllardan beri otelde görevli iş sağlığı güvenliği uzmanları, yerinde denetim yapan FQC gibi güvenlik belge sağlayıcı firmalar, farklı kamu kurum kurumları adına denetim için gelen denetçiler otelde sürdürülebilir risk analizi yapıldığını, yangın ihbar ve uyarı sisteminin aktif, yeterli, tüm yasal mevzuata uygun olduğunu belirtmişlerdir. Bu farklı kamu kurum ve kuruluşları kimlerdir? Bu denetçiler kimlerdir? Bunların isimleri nedir, nelerdir? Bunlar raporumuzun başka bir yerinde var mıdır?
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Var.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Burada yok.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Var, sonuç kısmında var, hepsi var.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Kurumları şey yapıyorsunuz yani o denetime gelen şeyleri falan... Yani bakanlıkların... Yani kimler gelmiştir? Tamam, ben sorayım, siz de şey yapın, sonra çok uzayınca Bakan benim konuştuğumu düşünüyor.
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Var, bunların hepsi raporda var.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Mesela, burada o sonuç şeyinde yazıyor, işte, birçok insanlarla... Mesela birinci derecede etkili, benim gördüğüm kadarıyla kamu kurum kuruluşları arasında birinci derecede etkili... Bir de şöyle bir tanım var: Birinci derecede asli kusurlu. Etkili ile asli kusurlu arasındaki fark nedir? Yani gelip de oraya rapor veren adam, yangın raporu veren adam ya da kurum neden etkili oluyor? Yani bence o yangının oluşmasına zemin hazırlayan o, kapıya kilidi vursa, işletmeyi kapatsa belki bu yangın olmayacak, olayı düzeltecek. Etkili ile tali kusurlu, asli kusurlu arasında hukuken fark nedir, onu öğrenmek isterim.
Bir de burada -çok özür dileyerek- mesela, sigorta şirketlerinden hiç bahsedilmemiş orada. Yani bu sigorta şirketlerinin, burayı sigorta eden şirketin tali, birinci derece, ikinci derece bir kabahati yok mudur?
GRAND KARTAL OTEL YANGINI BİLİRKİŞİSİ DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Onlardan bahsettik, onlara değinildi fakat kusur verme durumunda... Hocam, siz buyurun.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Ben bitireyim, ondan sonra Bakanım bize şey yapıyor, süreden şey yapmayalım.
Neyse ağabey, insicamımızı da bozdun Sayın Bakanım yani biz burada vallahi bir sürü...
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Ya, ne insicamı, hep sen konuşuyorsun millet dinliyor vallahi yani.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Vallahi bozuyorsun ya.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Arkadaşların da soracağı bütün soruları sordun sen zaten Ednan Bey.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Tamam, arkadaşlarımız da sorsun yani ben o zaman bir daha şey yapacağım Sayın Bakanım. Arkadaşlar da sorsun, ondan sonra devam ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Thank you very much, Mr. President.
I would like to thank the valuable expert committee for their valuable reports and efforts.
Of course, the purpose of this Commission is, first of all, to try to understand why this grave event happened, and to identify the negligence of public institutions and organizations at this point with the Commission report to be written by the Grand National Assembly of Turkey, to ensure that if there are deficiencies related to regulations or laws, they are completed, and on the other hand, to follow the ongoing judicial investigation and the court phase of the investigations that will continue through the prosecutor's office and the courts. Of course, the expert report is very valuable and valuable here. As a result, everything we write or do not write here, whether we detect it or not, can actually put public institutions under suspicion and third parties, the innocent ones, guilty, and the guilty ones innocent. In this sense, we know that ITU is a university that is extremely competent, knowledgeable and experienced in this regard. Our dear friend, our friend in the Commission, has also stated that these reports have been prepared meticulously and meticulously, and that they will be examined in the international arena, translations will be made, and that this report will be read by the world public opinion, and perhaps they will take it as data from their own perspective on how this incident developed, and with the data they have received, they will learn from this tragedy and perhaps rearrange their own laws and regulations in this sense. In this respect, this expert report is very important, but I
I would like to say this: This report is so important, so valuable, but hearing about this on social media or on screens before this report reaches us, before it reaches this Commission, made me extremely uncomfortable as a Commission member, my dear President. In other words, a report to which we attach so much importance, which was created as a result of the efforts of our valuable professors for days, was published before us, before the Commission, or before the prosecutor's office, I don't know, on social media.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Mr. Ednan, after talking to you, I researched. Normally - we also have legal friends here - the forensic expert submits his report to the Public Prosecutor's Office, and the moment he gives it, it is given to the relevant parties, that is, the lawyers, by the Public Prosecutor's Office. After it was given to all the lawyers, I remember it, we corresponded and talked together, after our friends give their report to the Public Prosecutor's Office, there is no chance of the report remaining confidential - our legal friends say this - it can be given to the relevant lawyers of the parties at the same time. Since it was given to those lawyers - I don't know how many lawyers there are, maybe there are dozens, hundreds of lawyers - there is nothing more natural than it being seen in the media, but I didn't know it that day, I researched the subject because I didn't know it very well.
SÜREYYA ÖNEŞ DERİCİ (Muğla) - They should have given it to our Commission first.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - I understand, but there is no chance to control him after he passes from the Public Prosecutor's Office to the lawyers.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Now, the issue is actually here.
NURETTİN ALAN (Istanbul) - The report that should be given to the prosecutor's office cannot be given here first, such a thing cannot happen.

CHAIRMAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - I told Ms. Süreyya, of course, since our Public Prosecutor's Office appointed the Commission, it will be given to the prosecutor's office first, there is no chance of it being given to us.
SÜREYYA ÖNEŞ DERİCİ (Muğla) - I'm not saying that, if it were given to our Commission simultaneously with the lawyers, we wouldn't have to learn about it from social media.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Unfortunately, once it is given to the lawyer, there is no before or after, so I researched that.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Anyway, President, the issue here is this: It seems to me that there is carelessness here, that is, if it was given to lawyers, if the lawyers spread it. So something like this shouldn't have happened. It is not right that this report, which we call the "6th big fire" in the report and "7th big fire" in the presentation, is being discussed and talked about on social media channels and television channels before the Commission, which was prepared with your sweat and effort to find the truth about this fire, because this may inevitably lead to manipulation of the public opinion. So, one of the biggest problems of this country was social media courts. In other words, we come across a lot of people, a lot of victims, who have been unfairly lynched and insulted, even to their families, on social media, we live it, we see these; There are people who face many unfair accusations. There are a lot of judicial processes, a lot of things going on to detect these. As I said, on such a sensitive issue, I think this report, which is very valuable for the Commission, valuable for the country, and especially for the prosecutor's office, should not have been discussed on social media or television in any way. So, if a confidentiality decision is taken in every job, I don't know if it could be made regarding this report. I am not a lawyer, I am an engineer. I want to convey this reproach here.
Now, in the next period, for example, what is your appointment date? I don't know that. So what you said is very important, going there in the first six hours and collecting evidence.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - The first six hours after the fire is extinguished because there are safety precautions.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - After the fire is extinguished and safety precautions are taken. For example, what is written in the report I have - Mr. Minister of Justice called it a "pirate report" - is very similar to your report, except for a few points - in the basic sense, because it is a preliminary report.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - It's completely wrong, I'm sorry, let me put it this way.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Let me finish, Teacher, then you answer us.
So, I'm trying to understand this: Was there a panel of experts on duty here before you? What I know, Mr. Minister of Justice, said that from the moment the severity of the fire became apparent and how big it was, an expert committee of 5 and then 7 people was appointed, if I remember correctly, but since your visit date was the 24th of the month, a committee was assigned before your committee.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - I explained it, I presented it. We can now say as much as we know.

Here, let me first say this about the report, we do not have anything about experts, but LPG is definitely not in that expert report.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - There is no LPG there; It was a few points.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Okay, but that is the main issue. I will tell you this: Look, the same thing is happening to us right now at the Uludağ Kervansaray Hotel; Currently, there is no footage sent to us, the footage is being processed at the Istanbul Gendarmerie Criminal Court, the problem is this: You are absolutely right when you say, someone sees something on social media and immediately comments.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Yes, it directs.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Now, this is very wrong. Our friend Servet just told us, until we got there, there was nothing, they spilled tomato juice, I don't know what they did to the oil, that evening, there was an electrical fire and so on.
But this must be based on a scientific basis. What we know is what you have just explained, Mr. Minister, if I may, let me tell you immediately: Now, when the incident starts, the fire brigade is notified at 3.30, the 21st is on fire, the 22nd is on fire, the experts come on the 22nd, in fact they come on the evening of the 21st, because it is morning, they come in and make inspections on the 22nd, but there is a committee of experts, we do not know exactly who it is, and - you name it - they say: "This incident is big, here is the laboratory." "We need the opportunity and the support of the Technical University." Now, I don't know if those experts are opposing it or who is opposing it, they refuse and want their dismissal, they are being dismissed, we don't know about it. We are talking on the 23rd.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Yes, that is not for you, I am making a general evaluation.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - But let me tell you the side that reflects on us. When he comes to the Technical University on the 23rd, we establish our delegation, and when we establish our delegation, we move quickly and see, what will we do? Now, as I just said, samples should be taken within 6 hours after the fire department extinguishes the fire, this is the right thing to do, but we went and took samples from there a month later. It took about a month and a half to find these pipes, of course we can't find them if you hide them. But this: Why did those experts withdraw? You know, we do not know the impeachment matters, we do not follow them on social media, but we tried to carry out the task given to us by the chief prosecutor's office in the fastest and most accurate way.
I was going to say this a moment ago, Mr. Minister: We examined nearly 400 gigabytes of images - this is a gigabyte, by the way, it is not a gigabyte, it is a gigabyte. 400 gigabytes of data roughly means watching 400 movies. Servet's eyes are already damaged, they have become even worse, you have to catch the smallest detail. The one who helps us here is that you see us as 7 people here, you see 8 people including my teacher, but please multiply it by 3, we are at least 25 people. So, all 25 people - I agree with what you just said - have information on social media that we do not have. We gave this report on March 18. Would you believe it? We are also following UYAP, what will happen to UYAP? But as in this report or in the Uludağ fire, for example, the visuals are in the media.

Now I ask the Gendarmerie, I ask the prosecutor: "Sir, there are more visuals in the media, more will come to us." he says. So, what can we do now as experts? Therefore, we can say that this is especially the last 2.5 pages of the 7-page article we gave you. It is highlighted there, there are details here.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Ok sir, me.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. SERVET İBRAHİM TİMUR - Dear Deputy, I really want to answer a question.
In principle, I am one of the professors who study fire thermodynamics. I was the last person to watch the images on social media in both Uludağ and Bolu. I didn't look until I came from the criminal police station, I still haven't looked at Uludağ. It hit social media six days after we gave our report. My wife still doesn't know anything about this report. My biggest fear, I'm telling you clearly, is whether my computer will be stolen while I am preparing this report, or whether a thief will break into my house and steal my computer.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Teacher, this is not an issue about you.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Let's make the recording, Mr. Ednan.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - You register.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. SERVET İBRAHİM TİMUR - No, you can rest easy.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Let me put it this way: We made an introduction to the questions I will ask you before going into the content of the report, let me put it that way. This disturbed me, something that disturbed me.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Mr. Ednan, let me say this, let me intervene here: Friends.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - President, let me finish, then let's do it.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - No, you will finish it, so I need to ensure consistency. Ednan Bey's statements are not directed at you, friends, in general terms, Ednan Bey had correspondence with me at night after that report was released, we corresponded with Mr. Resul, we corresponded with Nurettin, etc., most of our friends saw it too, we corresponded in the group. In general, I feel that discomfort, too. If a report sent to the prosecutor's office is released to the market after being given to lawyers, we have nothing to do about it. In any case, no one can claim that he was released from our expert panel before he was given to the prosecutor's office, there is no such thing anyway.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Dear Minister, the indictment has not been prepared, so the chief prosecutor's office may have delayed it because it is a 189-page report.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Of course, of course, I don't know about that, but there is no point in blaming the lawyers or anyone else or, I don't know who, our lawyers.
TÜRKER ATEŞ (Bolu) - Sir, in this system, no lawyer can get it without entering the system, that is, anyone can get it after entering the system.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Everyone buys it, that's why they bought it. After entering the system, it was released to the market.
Yes, here you go, Mr. Ednan.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Thank you, President.
Now, of course, I tried to examine this report in detail.

There is really a lot of work involved. This is an important report that goes into great detail, from the chemical formula and analysis of a combustion process to how it burns in the form of a scenario. I think it is a document that will make the most important contribution to this investigation and shed light on the truth.
Now, here you have defined the fire exit as follows, you have said: There is a "Grill Plate" here - I use it because you use it too - the thermostat of the "Grill Plate" is faulty and this heat is generated because it continues to work.
It reaches 300 degrees. The animal fats there begin to evaporate after reaching 180 degrees. You say that a cable causes the burning after it starts to evaporate, and that aging or arcing in a cable is the cause, but somewhere in the report you say that "no arcing, arcing or aging has been detected in the existing cables in the grill plate", and that this is due to the cable fed by a 63 ampere C type fuse from a panel. Is this cable the cable that comes directly and connects to the "grill plate"? It comes directly to the 63 ampere fuse, the cable that comes there and connects to it, this is what I understand. Well, then you say: It is the disinformation rate that that main cable carries excessive current and has already done something because of carrying excessive current, or we see that there is arcing, we see aging, but other than that, we are talking about the fact that there is no such aging or arcing or aging in any cable in the kitchen. Then I understand this: There is a panel, there is a 63 ampere fuse in that panel, type C, that type C fuse is directly connected to this "grill plate", a second secondary panel in between. There is no panel, that's my reading, there is a direct connection.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - It's not just obsolescence, let me correct your statement there, there is no other conductor group with internal combustion. In other words, there are many samples carrying high currents that we took from there. Since the place had changed location before us, we could not determine which cable was connected to where, since we were not the first delegation to go. Even the cables on the grill were removed, we also watched the disassembly video. Therefore, we could only find a few pieces of the wires of the heater resistors, which are called resistances, on top of the grill. Later, we read that the criminal gendarmerie had photographed it as a roll - the report also came to us - and that they reported that there was no short circuit with the eye and no arcing. In fact, when you came to visit that area, I refrained from entering it.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - You warned me, yes, I remember.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - Because we went there several times and took samples. Since we did not know what was where, we examined it with this sampling method and then, after I noticed the main cable, we followed the cable going from the wall, found the panel inside and removed the panel with a hammer and other hitting elements. Afterwards, we cut the cables with a saw and took them to the laboratory environment.

Then, from the side view and information of the removed fuse, I reached the brand and value of the fuse, and from there we came to the conclusion that it was C 63 ampere. We don't know whether it fired or not because that area was burned, the part related to the throwing mechanism, but since the side area was left in between, there is nothing.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - So that is a 63 amp fuse.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - It is directly connected to that region.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - For example, I could not see any information about the cross-section of the cable. What was the current carrying capacity of the cable here?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - We did not measure the cross section there, but there was something that could carry more than 63 amperes of current. There has been a renovation in that area, but you will see it again in the report.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Now, dear master, you are talking about a cable with a current carrying capacity of more than 63 amperes. Well, when excessive current passes through a cable with a current carrying capacity of more than 63 amperes, shouldn't the 63 ampere fuse there be blown or protected?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - It may not have shot at first because it was delayed. So every fuse has its characteristics. The current passing short circuit current may be a contact short circuit. Therefore, since the voltage is such a resistance, when there is a contact short circuit, the current may not suddenly increase to the values ​​you expect. In other words, each fuse has a capacity to carry 100 kilos to a certain location - type C fuses are especially delayed fuses - for a certain period of time, that is, when it reaches 110, it waits for a while to see if this will pass. If it goes up to 120, it still waits but reacts quicker. So, as the violence increases, this decreases.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - So you are saying that we detected the cable carrying excessive current due to burning, but we could not detect its cross-section; That's how I understand it.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - Its cross section is detected, so there is no problem with it.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - That's an important thing, though.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - No, let me tell you this: The short circuit there, the fire has nothing to do with the line. The comment after our, Serhat and Hoca's analysis is this - let me explain the sentence you read again - we say there: No high current was detected in the conductors in the resistance section. In other words, that place has done its job at its own capacity, but there is a molecular structure and microscopic defect in that line that indicates arcing and high current, long-term high current draw. This means that a high current has been drawn there, and there is no other device connected to this line or working there.
None of the devices there, none of the electricity there works. Therefore, there is a device that can draw only one current, and it is certain that there is a short circuit somewhere between its input and the resistors, we are sure of this.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - I, of course, understand this, so you say, "There is a cable here that draws excessive current, but there is no excessive current in the cables that reach and heat the resistances." you say.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - None. Hence with resistors.

CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Mr. Ednan, of course, when two coaches talk, you think we all understand.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - OK, sir. Now, I'm talking about something important here.
TUBA KÖKSAL (Kahramanmaraş) - Tell us where we will reach.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Let me put it this way: Now, here.
NURETTİN ALAN (Istanbul) - In a language we can understand. Let's understand too.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Simplify it a bit.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Now, they wrote the reason for the fire. Now, our teachers examined the cause of the fire and said: "This fire, there is a 63 ampere fuse in a panel, a cable comes from there, this cable enters this 'grill plate', this 'grill plate' burned out because it drew excessive current." Now, technically, I cannot understand how a device with a power of 7.5 kilowatts draws high current from a cable that is protected by 63 amperes but, as you put it, has a higher current carrying capacity.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - No, no, I'm talking about the rated current, not the short circuit current. We do not know how much the current increased in the short circuit, we do not know the contact resistance. What I'm talking about is that after the device was connected to electricity, after the cable was connected, there was a short circuit somewhere in the section going from here to the resistors, because we did not encounter any high current carrying in the conductors on this side, but there is something on this line and only one device is connected to that line. So that's what pushes us there, that's the point. Let me complete the sentence here: After the cables there lost their insulation due to a physical effect - cutting or exposure to high temperatures, etc. - there was a short circuit there, too, this is obvious.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - OK Sir, this is good. For example, you told me: "It's connected, it's arrived, the cable in between goes to the resistors." As a result, this cable is at the manufacturing stage, that is, it is a cable related to the device itself, not a cable added there later, but me.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - We don't know, they may have changed it.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - He had undergone an operation where the electrical cable of that "grill plate" had melted, plus, a change had been made there, he even showed the photograph, where the middle switch was different - there are 3 switches there, there is a "switch" - but now, when you search, you get a sketchy document. For example, somewhere they changed a thermocouple, but there is no date, no invoice, nothing. Now, as we said before, we find this by sniffing and tracing, that is why the microscopic analyzes here, but it is determined that the cable of the "grill plate" had melted before, that is, they melted the cable.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - Therefore, one of my sentences inside there was as follows in my report: In other words, it may have been caused by physical impact, it may have been folded while being moved, a device may have been placed on it, something may have been done when the inside was opened and closed, the interior may have been reached during cleaning, chemicals may have arrived, the chemicals used during cleaning may have damaged this electrical insulation.

There was an insulation deterioration there, which may have been caused by more than one reason, resulting in a short circuit and a high current carrying capacity.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - So here, the manufacturing defect of the "grill plate" is not evaluated concretely at all.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - No, there is a sentence about it in the later parts of the report, we cannot say anything concrete about it being a manufacturing defect, so it is related to that issue. That same brand must experience similar problems in many places, so we can say such a thing.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Mr. Ednan, let's finish please.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - OK President, let me continue now.
Of course, then you say: Well, here we see that the temperature of those resistors increases up to 300 degrees. Doesn't these animal fats, which evaporate at 180 degrees, have the ability to ignite it at 300 degrees? In other words, it came from the bottom or from the short circuit, but the resistance that had reached 300 degrees - which is what my dear teacher said - had already evaporated at 300 degrees or 200 degrees, 180 degrees.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - 200 is a little weak, but normally when it exceeds 240-250 there will be a problem.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Well, isn't there a possibility that that resistor could cause this fire?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. SERVET İBRAHİM TİMUR - Dear Deputy, the simple rule of thermodynamics is this: As the density of the heated material decreases, it goes up. 300 degree heat is on the surface of the "grill", the oils are below. Therefore, it is not that heat can come down to the bottom, the heat always goes up, so it is not that easy for the oils below to heat up. When this device is operating normally
heat always goes up. So you can hold your hand under the stove. There is no mistake in simile. So it's standing there, after the abnormality starts, there's a fire. Otherwise it would have to burn every day.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - OK Sir, thank you.
When I read this report, I always came across sentences like this: "Not enough information, documents, and projects could be obtained." So is there resistance to this? When you write to the institutions, as an expert, as an expert appointed by the prosecutor's office, do the institutions resist you on this issue? For example, there is no electricity project, why doesn't the electricity project come to you? Or - I'm so sorry - here is the fire department report, 22/11/2007; Among the documents forwarded to our expert panel by the Chief Public Prosecutor's Office, for example, I did not see a copy of this fire brigade report here or I do not know if I missed it. This fire report is important.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - It is in the annexes.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - On which page in the annexes? I couldn't find it.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Which one are you looking at? Are you looking at our 189-page report?
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Yes, I am looking at the 189-page report.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Its annexes were given separately. Attachments take up a lot of space. The attachments cost quite a few megabytes.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - So, we cannot see that fire brigade report because we have not received those attachments.

GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Can I say something, Mr. Deputy? Let me tell you this right away: Look, the Kartal State Hospital fire comes to my mind, the 2006 airport cargo building fire comes to mind, the old international lines. Now, do you know what the problem is here?
RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - There is an addition, we are just learning.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Sir, I apologize, I understand that we know that it has suffixes, it is not whether we have heard it or not, it definitely has suffixes. We do not have the chance to collect and distribute the supplements. Why? 3 thousand, 4 thousand, 5 thousand pages.
RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - If they send it to us with an Excel file, we will take it from there.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Dear Minister, it is already on social media, the report you mentioned is already on social media.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Let's take it from social media, Sir.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - That's what they tell us.
By the way, I don't have social media, let me tell you that, I don't use it.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Friends, I request you to wait a minute.
This is the report we requested from our Chief Public Prosecutor's Office, this is what we received, and we gave it to you.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - If you had requested the attachments, they would have sent them to you.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Friends, this is what we call "report", this is the report we requested from the public prosecutor's office and this is what we received. We sent you the same.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Dear Minister, can I say this in response to Ednan Bey's question?
Now, it is about the arrival of information and documents, unfortunately there is slums in our country, it is present in every aspect. Now, look, Kartal State Hospital, which was built as an oncology hospital in 1975, took on a different structure when it burned down. ITU Faculty of Chemistry Metallurgy, where I studied, became Chemistry Metallurgy in 1983, we had a building. The glass and ceramics building was built in 1985. I went to England and came back, 2 more buildings were built. In other words, we cannot design this building from scratch and make it fully functional. Do you know what the problem is? Our architect friend is here, and if there is an architect among you, the wet volumes and wet volumes of each building are clear; Here are the toilets, men and women, etc. We have such a large wealth of toilets that since there are 4 separate buildings, there are toilets at each end of each building, and we had to turn them into rooms later. This is our problem, Mr. Deputy. So, for example, in an airport fire, we say, "Brother, this was an international terminal, it was cargo." Now, I am sincerely saying that they have built 10 offices in this place, each of them has air conditioning. We say send the installation for this, give us something, 14 sacks of maps, sheets, etc., all from 1975 and 1977. That's why these solution suggestions are so important. So we want something, I didn't see, I didn't hear, I didn't do, I didn't know. Do you know what is most important? No matter what you do with electricity, gas or water, LPG installation is very important. In other words, the company name does not matter in LPG installation, we have been working with them for years. Well, remember the dormitory fire, Aladağ, Konya etc.
Dear Deputy, every company has responsibility, joint and several liability, no matter how well it does a job.

Therefore, this does not end with "I did my job properly." Now, we are wondering, you put the tank there, you put the plumbing there inside, how do you bring LPG so easily without taking preventive and protective measures in an area where the people we call the "show part" are densely populated - not everyone skis there, when you look at the photos and videos, people are eating there, spending time, etc. There are at least 70-80 people, there are already more than 100 employees?
By the way, we missed a detail. Now, look, you can probably see it here.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - It's been a long time.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - That LPG is coming, it is connected from here, it is extended and passed through a "flexi" pipe from here. Now, it's burning here in a way, burning from below. By the way, there are some things under this cabinet, they are burning, the garbage is burning. If there was an automatic extinguishing system in the hood here or there, the job would be over. It comes here and warms this place first. This is essentially true. After heating, LPG starts to leak, we see these from moment to moment. After this leaks, that is, if this hose wasn't there, if he connected it here, while this place is burning - after a few minutes, the girls come and go anyway, the servers will see it and maybe put it out. The mistake here is technical. Now, we say, who shot this? There is no answer to this. Who brought this here?
RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - Did you watch it in the video?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - We watched it, of course.
So the problem is this: If there is a sensor here and a fully automatic extinguishing system, there is no problem.
If these hoses are pulled properly, the personnel there can also intervene.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - If there is a chance to come physically. I want digital.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Let's ask, President, we have said that before.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - There is only a high camera near the middle entrance.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - By the way, I'm sorry Minister, I can give you the attachments, I have them on my computer, I can give them via USB.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - No problem, we will buy it, but I don't know if there is a chance of it coming digitally, let me see.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - It cannot come, it is difficult, it must come with USB or WeTransfer, that is, Drive.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Let our expert Mr. Emrah follow him and let's do something accordingly.
Mr. Ednan, you have completed it.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - President, I have not completed it, it is not finished, I continue.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - But I ask.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Now, the fire department report.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - We cannot finish the meeting with you.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - President, time. Well, look, let me put it this way: All of our friends who came before this were very valuable and valuable, we listened to all of them as much as we had time, but while the friends who will form the main body of this work and prepare the expert report are here.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - I understand, but Mr. Ednan, we have friends other than you.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Okay, sir, let it last until twelve, let it last until the morning, but let's talk about this.

CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - I understand that this Commission is not limited to you, our other friends also want to speak, and I will give it to them too.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - President, you can give it. Here, please, I request you, let me finish my work and ask my questions, President.
PRESIDENT SELAMI ALTINOK - You're welcome.
Then ask questions without commenting and let's finish.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - I'm not making a comment, I'm asking a short question.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - But look, we have allocated half an hour for you, you have been talking for half an hour, but I ask.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Mr. President, I have not spoken for half an hour.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - But in front of me, I see my friends, many of our friends also want to speak.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Well, I'm not saying that no one wants to speak, I mean, I couldn't figure out your desire to finish this job in a hurry.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - I am not in a hurry, friends, but I have 15 more friends.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Let me talk. Okay President, that's all from me.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - Then, go ahead and hold the meeting.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Dear Minister, I apologize, the questions asked by Mr. Ednan are actually questions that many of our members will ask, that's why I think.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - I understand, it's okay. Sir, I ask that we and these friends are not sitting here in vain.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Brother, let me ask one or two more, you do your thing, wait a second.
PRESIDENT SELAMI ALTINOK - Here you go.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Now, this is the fire department report in 2007. A fire regulation was issued in 2002, and it says: "Existing buildings will be closed if they do not correct these deficiencies within two years." In other words, building occupancy permits will be cancelled. Have you ever received such a document? Have you received such a document for 2004 or 2005 stating that the building occupancy permit has been cancelled?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT PERSON PROF. DR. LEVENT TRABZON - There is no such document.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - No such document has been received. After all, there was a regulation in 2002, it defined two years for these existing hotels, but this hotel's building permit was not canceled in four years, or in 2004 or 2005, even though it should have been cancelled. Interestingly, the date of the fire brigade report is 22/11/2007, and the effective date of the subsequent regulation is 19/12/2007, meaning that a fire brigade report was received almost twenty to twenty-five days ago. In other words, I think it needs explanation as to who gave the report for this redemption, what kind of findings they made, what kind of investigations they made.
One of the important things in your report is this, on page 38, you say the following: When the current document records we have are examined, occupational health and safety experts working in the hotel for the past years, security certificate provider companies such as FQC that carry out on-site inspections, and auditors coming for inspection on behalf of different public institutions stated that a sustainable risk analysis was carried out in the hotel and that the fire alarm and warning system is active, sufficient and in compliance with all legal regulations. Who are these different public institutions and organizations? Who are these auditors? What are their names, what are they?

Are these included elsewhere in our report?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Yes.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - Not here.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Yes, it is in the conclusion, it is all there.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - You are making institutions, that is, things that come under control and so on. I mean ministries. So who came? Okay, I'll ask, you do something, then when it gets too long, the Minister thinks I'm talking.
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - Yes, all of these are in the report.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - For example, it is written here in the conclusion, here, with many people. For example, it is first degree effective, as far as I can see, it is first degree effective among public institutions and organizations. There is also a definition like this: First degree fundamental fault. What is the difference between effective and essentially defective? In other words, why is the man or institution that comes and reports there effective? So, in my opinion, he is the one who prepared the ground for that fire. If he locks the door and closes the business, maybe this fire will not happen, he will fix the incident. I would like to know what is the legal difference between effective, secondary and primary fault.
And here - with all due apologies - for example, insurance companies are not mentioned at all. So, don't these insurance companies, the company that insures this place, have a secondary, first degree or second degree fault?
GRAND KARTAL HOTEL FIRE EXPERT DR. HİKMET İSKENDER - We talked about them, they were mentioned, but in case of fault. Sir, here you go.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Let me finish, after that, my Minister is doing something to us, let's not do anything that takes time.
Anyway, brother, you have broken our harmony, Mr. Minister, I mean, there are a lot of us here.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Oh, how consistent, you always talk, I swear the people listen.
EDNAN ARSLAN (Izmir) - I swear, you are spoiling it.
CHAIRMAN SELAMI ALTINOK - You have already asked all the questions that your friends will ask, Mr. Ednan.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Okay, let our friends also ask, so I will do something again, Mr. Minister. Let my friends ask, then I will continue.

fields.Subject: Tüm İtfaiyeciler Birliği Derneği (TİBDER) Genel Başkan Yardımcısı Mehmet Olcay Bal'ın, itfaiyenin önemi, mevzuatı, genel ve özel sorunları ile çözüm önerileri hakkında sunumu münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkanım.
Öncelikle üç Daire Başkanımıza bu değerli sunumları ve bilgilendirmeleri için çok teşekkür ediyorum.
Aslında ülke olarak ne mantıkta olduğumuz,
daire başkanlarımızın biraz önceki sunumlarının içerisinde aslında ipuçlarını verdi bize. Olay oluyor, toplumsal hassasiyet yükseliyor, toplumsal hassasiyetin yükselmesinden sonra hemen devletin kurumları harekete geçiyor ve başlıyorlar -bazı yönlerden de zarar veren uygulamalarla- birtakım iş ve işlemler yapıyorlar. İşte ne yapıyor sayın kaymakamlarımız? Hemen yazı yazıyorlar ilgili yerlere "Kamu kurum kurumlarını denetleyin..." Bir başka yetkili, bir başka talimat... Artık "Yeteneği o kadar var mıdır, yok mudur; bu alt taraftaki personel, talimat verdiği, yazı yazdığı yapılar bu işi yapabilir mi yapamaz mı ya da -bu işin, biraz evvel konuştuk, fiziki koşulları var, mevcut bina stoku var, mevcut bina stokunda ya da bazı yerlerde tarihî bina da var- burada bu önlem alınabilir mi alınamaz mı bakmadan, hemen -iki satır yazıyla- biz üzerimizden defibela edelim bu işi, ondan sonra yazı kimde kalırsa o düşünsün." mantığıyla hareket ediyoruz.
Ben aslında mesleki olarak da bu işe uzun zamandır böyle dikkatlice bakan biriyim, bu olaydan sonra çok daha dikkatli bakmaya başladım. Gördüğüm şu benim: Çok Kartalkaya var; böyle bir iki tane falan değil, çok var. Yani bugün şuradan çıkıp gidelim, Ankara'daki otelleri denetleyelim; gidelim, Antalya'daki otelleri denetleyelim; gidelim, Türkiye'de herhangi bir hastaneyi denetleyelim -hepsini yani nereye gidersek gidelim- inanın bizde belki de çok ciddi anlamda sorunlar var, ciddi anlamda problemler var. Tabii, bu bir süreç meselesi yani bugünden yarına çözülebilecek bir mesele de değil. İşin ekonomik boyutu var, işin bizim üzerimize düşen boyutu var, standartlar oluşturma boyutu var -yani var oğlu var- eğitim boyutu var, yapılar yerelde mi kalsın... Ki benim şahsi görüşüm yerelde itfaiyenin güçlendirilmesi, eksiklerinin tamamlanması, üstten tek tip bir yönetmeliğin oluşturulması -işte bahsetti daire başkanlarımız- "checklist"lerinin tek tip yapılması, 2012'de inşaat ruhsatı almadan önce itfaiyeye giden projelerin bundan sonra da tekrar itfaiyeye gidip uzmanlar tarafından en ince ayrıntısına kadar denetlenmesi. Bunların hepsinin yapılması gerekiyor. Tabii bu Komisyon bu konuda çalışacak, çok da geniş bir rapor olacak hepimizin gördüğü kadarıyla. Dediğim gibi, uzun bir süreç, önemli bir süreç ve sonunda da inşallah biz bu işleri çözmüş oluruz ama neyi ne yaparsak yapalım, neyi nereye yazarsak yazalım gözünü kâr hırsı bürümüş işletmeler, ahlaksız kamu görevlileri yan yana geldiği zaman maalesef her şeyi yapmak mümkün olabilir yani olmayan yere itfaiye raporu verilebiliyorsa bu dediğim şey geçerlidir; gözünü para hırsı bürümüş bir iş adamı ve buna göz yuman ahlaksız bir imza kullanan bürokrat. Bunu çözmemiz gerek, asıl çözülmesi gereken bu. Dünya bu işi mesela birçok yerde ani baskınlarla, habersiz baskınlarla çözmüş; bir kurum tebdilikıyafet gitmiş çözmüş. Mesela, şu da var birçok yerde, gelişmiş, bu sorunu çözmüş yerde: Vatandaş kendi otokontrolünü kendi sağlıyor. Otele gidiyor, hastaneye gidiyor ya da hizmet aldığı bir alana gidip orada gördüğü eksikliği şikâyet ediyor, ihbar ediyor. Bizde bir dönem vardı -şimdi var mı bilmiyorum, Sayın Bakanım siz daha iyi bilirsiniz- trafik müfettişleri vardı, fahri müfettişler vardı.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Var, hâlâ var.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Var değil mi, devam ediyor. Mesela, çok önemli bir şey yani birinin hayatını tehlikeye atan trafikteki bir sürücünün ihbar edilmesi çok kıymetli, çok değerli bir şey ve bunun gereğini... Bu tarz şeylerin de ülke için aslında geniş olması gerekiyor. Mesela, kurumsal firmaların birçoğu şöyle bir şey yapıyor: Müşteri gibi kendi firmalarına, mağazalarına birilerini gönderiyor, fahri müfettişleri gönderiyor; gidiyor oradaki müdüründen personeline, vatandaşa nasıl davrandığından rafta ürünü nasıl koruduğuna, nasıl sunduğuna, temizliğine, hijyenine, bir sürü şeye böyle otokontrol sağlıyor. Yani en basiti mesela, benzin istasyonlarının tuvalet hijyeniyle ilgili girdikleri yarıştaki o ihbar mekanizmasının iyi çalışıyor olması aslında bir anda standartları yükseltti. Bu işi iyi yapan kişileri kurumsal anlamda hem güçlendirdi hem de ciddi anlamda cirolarını da yükseltti.
BAŞKAN SELAMİ ALTINOK - Reklamda onu veriyorlar, reklamda onu önceliyorlar. Dün akşam izledim daha "Buraya geldiniz, burası temiz, pırıl pırıl." bilmem ne falan diye...
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Kesinlikle.
Bizim öncelikle -dediğim gibi- eğitimlerle biraz bu işi çözmemiz lazım yani bu işi anaokulundan itibaren çocuklarımıza bir ders olarak vermemiz gerekiyor. Bunu sağladığımız zaman birçok şeyi
çözmüş oluruz.
Ben burada üç dört tane soru soracağım. Bu sorular benim değil, sizi de belki kısmen ilgilendiriyor, belki ilgilendirmiyor, Kartalkaya'yı görmüş de olabilirsiniz, görmemiş de olabilirsiniz, 16 yaşında olan bir kardeşimizin soruları bunlar aslında; şu an hayatta değil, iki gün önce annesi bana yazdı. Kızımızın adı Nehir, Kartalkaya'da bu kardeşimiz maalesef hayattan koptu. Annesi bu soruları bana yolladı "Ne olursun, sorabilir misiniz?" diye. Başkanım, çağrılacak olan mağdur ailelerle bu anneyi de çağıralım. Ben bu soruları sorayım -dediğim gibi- en azından tutanaklara da geçmiş olsun. Anne "Otelde kalan insanların yoğun bulunduğu yamaç kısımlarına karadan müdahalenin mümkün olmadığını bildikleri hâlde helikopterlerle havadan kurtarma ve tahliye çalışmaları başlatılması gerekmez miydi? Havadan müdahale can kayıplarını önleyebilecekken bu müdahale yönteminin kullanılması gerekmez miydi?" diye sormuş. Bir diğer soruda "Yangının ilk anlarında içeride mahsur kalan insanlara maske, oksijen tüpü gibi temel hayatta kalma ekipmanlarının ulaştırılması gerekmez miydi? Duman zehirlenmesi riskinin bu kadar yüksek olduğu bir ortamda bu önlem neden alınmadı? Yangın yerine gelen ilk müdahale ekiplerinin doğru ekipmana sahip olması gerekmez miydi?" demiş. Bir başka soru: "Eğer bölgede yeterli donanıma sahip olunmadığı fark edildiyse çevre illerden destek ekip çağrısı yapılması daha doğru olmaz mıydı? Sizce bu vakada kamuoyuna yansıyan gecikme normal kabul edilebilecek bir durum mu, yoksa profesyonel sorumluluğu aşan bir ihmal mi?" Bir başka soru: "Sizler itfaiye şefleri olarak bu yangında yaşananları izlediğinizde, itfaiyenin görev alanı bakımından baktığınızda mesleki etik açısından da iç huzurla, doğru yapılmış diyebileceğiniz tek bir şey var mıdır?" demiş. Bir başka soru daha yollamış tekrar anne bana: "'42 kilometre yol geldik.' diyorlar. Neden o kadar yol gelmek zorunda kaldın? Orada şubat tatiline özel olsa bile iki araç bulunduramaz mısınız sadece iki hafta için?" diye sormuş. Anne bunları kızımız adına sormuş ve demiş ki: "Nehir hep 16 yaşında kalacak." Allah rahmet eylesin, kardeşiyle beraber o yangında vefat etmiş. Bu annenin de Komisyonda dinlenmesini ve sormasını istediği soruları da açık ve net bir şekilde Sayın Başkanım, gelip burada sormasını istiyorum. Eğer yasama uzmanı arkadaşımız notunu alırsa annenin, ben iletişim bilgilerini de ileteyim. Dediğim gibi, yani önemli olan yangın olduktan sonra ne yapacağımız değil, bu yangınlar olmadan önce hangi önlemleri almamız gerektiğidir. Bu olaylar olacak mıdır? Olacak, dünyada da oluyor ama can kaybı olmadan, daha az mal kaybıyla bu işi nasıl atlatacağımızın aynı geminin içinde olan insanlar olarak hep beraber çaresini buluyor olmamız lazım diyorum.
Teşekkür ediyorum katkınız için.
records.englishTranslation:
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.
First of all, I would like to thank our three Department Heads for their valuable presentations and information.
In fact, what kind of mentality we have as a country,
Our department heads actually gave us clues in their previous presentations. An incident happens, social sensitivity rises, and after the rise of social sensitivity, the state institutions immediately take action and begin to carry out some work and transactions - in some ways with harmful practices. What are our esteemed district governors doing? They immediately write to the relevant places: "Inspect public institutions." Another official, another instruction. "Whether he has the talent or not; whether the personnel below him, the structures he instructs and writes to, can or cannot do this job, or - as we have just talked about, this job has physical conditions, there is an existing building stock, there are historical buildings in the existing building stock or in some places - whether this precaution can be taken here, let's immediately - in two lines of writing - defibel this job from us, and then whoever has the writing should think about it." We act with logic.
Actually, I have been someone who has been paying attention to this issue professionally for a long time, and after this incident, I started to look at it much more carefully. This is what I see: There are many Kartalkayas; There are not just one or two like this, there are many. So today, let's go out of here and inspect the hotels in Ankara; Let's go and check the hotels in Antalya; Let's go and inspect any hospital in Türkiye - I mean all of them, wherever we go - believe me, we may have serious problems, there are serious problems. Of course, this is a process issue, that is, it is not an issue that can be solved from today to tomorrow. There is the economic aspect of the matter, there is the aspect of our responsibility, there is the aspect of setting standards - that is, there is a son - there is the educational dimension, should the structures remain local? My personal opinion is that the fire brigade should be strengthened at the local level, its deficiencies should be completed, a uniform regulation should be created from above - here is what our department heads talked about - the "checklists" should be made uniform, and the projects that went to the fire brigade before obtaining a construction permit in 2012 should go to the fire brigade again and be inspected by experts to the smallest detail. All of these need to be done. Of course, this Commission will work on this issue, and as far as we can all see, it will be a very comprehensive report. As I said, it is a long process, an important process, and I hope we will solve these problems at the end, but no matter what we do or where we write, unfortunately, when businesses greedy for profit and immoral public officials come together, it is possible to do anything. That is, if a fire report can be given where there is no such thing, what I said is valid; A businessman who is blinded by his greed for money and a bureaucrat who turns a blind eye to this and uses an immoral signature. We need to solve this, that's what really needs to be solved. For example, the world has solved this problem with sudden raids and unannounced raids in many places; An institution went and solved the change. For example, there is this in many places that have developed and solved this problem: Citizens provide their own self-control.

He goes to a hotel, goes to a hospital, or goes to an area where he receives service and complains about the deficiencies he sees there. There was a time when we had traffic inspectors - I don't know if we have them now, Mr. Minister, you know better - there were traffic inspectors, there were honorary inspectors.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Yes, there still is.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - There is, isn't it, it continues. For example, it is very important to report a driver who endangers someone's life, it is a very valuable thing and it is necessary. These kinds of things actually need to be broad for the country. For example, many corporate companies do something like this: They send people, such as customers, to their companies and stores, and send honorary inspectors; He goes there and provides such self-control over many things, from his manager to his staff, from how he treats citizens to how he protects the product on the shelf, how he presents it, cleanliness and hygiene. For example, the simplest thing is that the well-functioning reporting mechanism in the competition between gas stations regarding toilet hygiene actually raised the standards. It both strengthened the people who do this job well in an institutional sense and significantly increased their turnover.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - They give it in advertisements, they prioritize it in advertisements. I watched it last night and said, "You came here, this place is clean, sparkling." I don't know what it is.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Absolutely.
First of all, as I said, we need to solve this issue through training, that is, we need to teach this issue as a lesson to our children starting from kindergarten. When we achieve this, we can do many things
We will have solved it.
I will ask three or four questions here. These questions are not mine, they may or may not concern you partially, you may or may not have seen Kartalkaya, these are actually the questions of a 16-year-old brother of ours; He is not alive now, his mother wrote to me two days ago. Our daughter's name is Nehir, unfortunately this sister of ours passed away in Kartalkaya. His mother sent me these questions: "Please, can you ask?" saying. President, let's call this mother along with the victim families who will be called. Let me ask these questions - as I said - so that they can at least be included in the minutes. Mother: "Shouldn't air rescue and evacuation efforts be initiated with helicopters, even though they know that it is not possible to intervene from land on the slopes where people staying in the hotel are concentrated? Shouldn't this intervention method be used when aerial intervention could prevent loss of life?" he asked. Another question was, "Shouldn't basic survival equipment such as masks and oxygen tanks be delivered to people trapped inside in the first moments of the fire? Why wasn't this precaution taken in an environment where the risk of smoke poisoning was so high? Shouldn't the first responders arriving at the scene of the fire have the right equipment?" he said. Another question: "If it was noticed that there was not enough equipment in the region, wouldn't it be more appropriate to call for a support team from the surrounding provinces? Do you think the delay reflected in the public opinion in this case is a situation that can be considered normal, or is it an negligence that exceeds professional responsibility?"

" Another question: "As fire chiefs, when you watch what happened in this fire, when you look at the fire department's field of duty, is there a single thing that you can say with peace of mind and that it was done right in terms of professional ethics?" The mother sent me another question: "'We have come 42 kilometers.' they say. Why did you have to come all this way? "Can't you keep two vehicles there for just two weeks, even if it's for the February holidays?" he asked. The mother asked these questions on behalf of our daughter and said: "The river will always be 16 years old." May God have mercy on her, she passed away in that fire with her brother. I want this mother to be heard in the Commission and ask the questions she wants to ask clearly, Mr. President, to come and ask here. If our legislative expert friend takes her note, I will also pass on your mother's contact information. As I said, it is important. What happens is not what we will do after the fire occurs, but what precautions we should take before these fires happen. Will these events happen? They will happen in the world, but I say we need to find a solution together as people in the same ship, how to get through this without loss of life and with less loss of property.
Thank you for your contribution.

records.originalTurkish:
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkanım.
Öncelikle üç Daire Başkanımıza bu değerli sunumları ve bilgilendirmeleri için çok teşekkür ediyorum.
Aslında ülke olarak ne mantıkta olduğumuz,
daire başkanlarımızın biraz önceki sunumlarının içerisinde aslında ipuçlarını verdi bize. Olay oluyor, toplumsal hassasiyet yükseliyor, toplumsal hassasiyetin yükselmesinden sonra hemen devletin kurumları harekete geçiyor ve başlıyorlar -bazı yönlerden de zarar veren uygulamalarla- birtakım iş ve işlemler yapıyorlar. İşte ne yapıyor sayın kaymakamlarımız? Hemen yazı yazıyorlar ilgili yerlere "Kamu kurum kurumlarını denetleyin..." Bir başka yetkili, bir başka talimat... Artık "Yeteneği o kadar var mıdır, yok mudur; bu alt taraftaki personel, talimat verdiği, yazı yazdığı yapılar bu işi yapabilir mi yapamaz mı ya da -bu işin, biraz evvel konuştuk, fiziki koşulları var, mevcut bina stoku var, mevcut bina stokunda ya da bazı yerlerde tarihî bina da var- burada bu önlem alınabilir mi alınamaz mı bakmadan, hemen -iki satır yazıyla- biz üzerimizden defibela edelim bu işi, ondan sonra yazı kimde kalırsa o düşünsün." mantığıyla hareket ediyoruz.
Ben aslında mesleki olarak da bu işe uzun zamandır böyle dikkatlice bakan biriyim, bu olaydan sonra çok daha dikkatli bakmaya başladım. Gördüğüm şu benim: Çok Kartalkaya var; böyle bir iki tane falan değil, çok var. Yani bugün şuradan çıkıp gidelim, Ankara'daki otelleri denetleyelim; gidelim, Antalya'daki otelleri denetleyelim; gidelim, Türkiye'de herhangi bir hastaneyi denetleyelim -hepsini yani nereye gidersek gidelim- inanın bizde belki de çok ciddi anlamda sorunlar var, ciddi anlamda problemler var. Tabii, bu bir süreç meselesi yani bugünden yarına çözülebilecek bir mesele de değil. İşin ekonomik boyutu var, işin bizim üzerimize düşen boyutu var, standartlar oluşturma boyutu var -yani var oğlu var- eğitim boyutu var, yapılar yerelde mi kalsın... Ki benim şahsi görüşüm yerelde itfaiyenin güçlendirilmesi, eksiklerinin tamamlanması, üstten tek tip bir yönetmeliğin oluşturulması -işte bahsetti daire başkanlarımız- "checklist"lerinin tek tip yapılması, 2012'de inşaat ruhsatı almadan önce itfaiyeye giden projelerin bundan sonra da tekrar itfaiyeye gidip uzmanlar tarafından en ince ayrıntısına kadar denetlenmesi. First of all, I would like to thank our three Department Heads for their valuable presentations and information.
In fact, what kind of mentality we have as a country,
Our department heads actually gave us clues in their previous presentations. An incident happens, social sensitivity rises, and after the rise of social sensitivity, the state institutions immediately take action and begin to carry out some work and transactions - in some ways with harmful practices. What are our esteemed district governors doing? They immediately write to the relevant places: "Inspect public institutions." Another official, another instruction. "Whether he has the talent or not; whether the personnel below him, the structures he instructs and writes to, can or cannot do this job, or - as we have just talked about, this job has physical conditions, there is an existing building stock, there are historical buildings in the existing building stock or in some places - whether this precaution can be taken here, let's immediately - in two lines of writing - defibel this job from us, and then whoever has the writing should think about it." We act with logic.
Actually, I have been someone who has been paying attention to this issue professionally for a long time, and after this incident, I started to look at it much more carefully. This is what I see: There are many Kartalkayas; There are not just one or two like this, there are many. So today, let's go out of here and inspect the hotels in Ankara; Let's go and check the hotels in Antalya; Let's go and inspect any hospital in Türkiye - I mean all of them, wherever we go - believe me, we may have serious problems, there are serious problems. Of course, this is a process issue, that is, it is not an issue that can be solved from today to tomorrow. There is the economic aspect of the matter, there is the aspect of our responsibility, there is the aspect of setting standards - that is, there is a son - there is the educational dimension, should the structures remain local? My personal opinion is that the fire brigade should be strengthened at the local level, its deficiencies should be completed, a uniform regulation should be created from above - here is what our department heads talked about - the "checklists" should be made uniform, and the projects that went to the fire brigade before obtaining a construction permit in 2012 should go to the fire brigade again and be inspected by experts to the smallest detail. All of these need to be done. Of course, this Commission will work on this issue, and as far as we can all see, it will be a very comprehensive report. As I said, it is a long process, an important process, and I hope we will solve these problems at the end, but no matter what we do or where we write, unfortunately, when businesses greedy for profit and immoral public officials come together, it is possible to do anything. That is, if a fire report can be given where there is no such thing, what I said is valid; A businessman who is blinded by his greed for money and a bureaucrat who turns a blind eye to this and uses an immoral signature. We need to solve this, that's what really needs to be solved. For example, the world has solved this problem with sudden raids and unannounced raids in many places; An institution went and solved the change. For example, there is this in many places that have developed and solved this problem: Citizens provide their own self-control.

He goes to a hotel, goes to a hospital, or goes to an area where he receives service and complains about the deficiencies he sees there. There was a time when we had traffic inspectors - I don't know if we have them now, Mr. Minister, you know better - there were traffic inspectors, there were honorary inspectors.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - Yes, there still is.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - There is, isn't it, it continues. For example, it is very important to report a driver who endangers someone's life, it is a very valuable thing and it is necessary. These kinds of things actually need to be broad for the country. For example, many corporate companies do something like this: They send people, such as customers, to their companies and stores, and send honorary inspectors; He goes there and provides such self-control over many things, from his manager to his staff, from how he treats citizens to how he protects the product on the shelf, how he presents it, cleanliness and hygiene. For example, the simplest thing is that the well-functioning reporting mechanism in the competition between gas stations regarding toilet hygiene actually raised the standards. It both strengthened the people who do this job well in an institutional sense and significantly increased their turnover.
MAYOR SELAMI ALTINOK - They give it in advertisements, they prioritize it in advertisements. I watched it last night and said, "You came here, this place is clean, sparkling." I don't know what it is.
EDNAN ARSLAN (İzmir) - Absolutely.
First of all, as I said, we need to solve this issue through training, that is, we need to teach this issue as a lesson to our children starting from kindergarten. When we achieve this, we can do many things
We will have solved it.
I will ask three or four questions here. These questions are not mine, they may or may not concern you partially, you may or may not have seen Kartalkaya, these are actually the questions of a 16-year-old brother of ours; He is not alive now, his mother wrote to me two days ago. Our daughter's name is Nehir, unfortunately this sister of ours passed away in Kartalkaya. His mother sent me these questions: "Please, can you ask?" saying. President, let's call this mother along with the victim families who will be called. Let me ask these questions - as I said - so that they can at least be included in the minutes. Mother: "Shouldn't air rescue and evacuation efforts be initiated with helicopters, even though they know that it is not possible to intervene from land on the slopes where people staying in the hotel are concentrated? Shouldn't this intervention method be used when aerial intervention could prevent loss of life?" he asked. Another question was, "Shouldn't basic survival equipment such as masks and oxygen tanks be delivered to people trapped inside in the first moments of the fire? Why wasn't this precaution taken in an environment where the risk of smoke poisoning was so high? Shouldn't the first responders arriving at the scene of the fire have the right equipment?" he said. Another question: "If it was noticed that there was not enough equipment in the region, wouldn't it be more appropriate to call for a support team from the surrounding provinces? Do you think the delay reflected in the public opinion in this case is a situation that can be considered normal, or is it an negligence that exceeds professional responsibility?"

" Another question: "As fire chiefs, when you watch what happened in this fire, when you look at the fire department's field of duty, is there a single thing that you can say with peace of mind and that it was done right in terms of professional ethics?" The mother sent me another question: "'We have come 42 kilometers.' they say. Why did you have to come all this way? "Can't you keep two vehicles there for just two weeks, even if it's for the February holidays?" he asked. The mother asked these questions on behalf of our daughter and said: "The river will always be 16 years old." May God have mercy on her, she passed away in that fire with her brother. I want this mother to be heard in the Commission and ask the questions she wants to ask clearly, Mr. President, to come and ask here. If our legislative expert friend takes her note, I will also pass on your mother's contact information. As I said, it is important. What happens is not what we will do after the fire occurs, but what precautions we should take before these fires happen. Will these events happen? They will happen in the world, but I say we need to find a solution together as people in the same ship, how to get through this without loss of life and with less loss of property.
Thank you for your contribution.
records.englishTitle: Presentation of Mehmet Olcay Bal, Deputy Chairman of All Fire Fighters Union Association (TİBDER), about the importance of the fire department, its legislation, general and special problems and solution suggestions.
